source_notes.approval: FiveThirtyEight average — October 2022. Entered manually for backtest use.
source_notes.gdp: BEA Q2 2022 real GDP growth (%) — two consecutive negative quarters, technical recession. Entered manually for backtest use.
source_notes.unemployment: BLS UNRATE — Unemployment rate (%) — October 2022. Entered manually for backtest use.
source_notes.cpi: BLS CPI-U — October 2022 year-over-year percent change (inflation peak). Entered manually for backtest use.
source_notes.consumer_sentiment: University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index — October 2022 final. Entered manually for backtest use.
source_notes.note: Historical fundamentals snapshot for 2022 backtest cycle. Not fetched programmatically.
